zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabell Brome於1454年之前出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓時，她的父親John Brome38歲，母親Beatrix Shirley11450歲。她於1468年之前與Phillip Purifoy結婚。她去世於大約1540年在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Brome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabell Brome was born before 1454, in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Brome, was 38 and her mother, Beatrix Shirley, was 11450. She married Phillip Purifoy before 1468. She died about 1540, in England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Phillip Purifoy prima del 1468. Morì circa 1540, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell Brome(이)가 1454년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Brome(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Shirley(은)는 11450세였다. 그녀는 1468년 이전 Phillip Purifoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.
